history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays a screenshot from what appears to be an anime or manga viewing platform. It features an anime character with light purple hair and closed eyes, with text in Indonesian overlaid on the image. Below the character, there's a section for comments, showing a total of 20.4K comments. The interface includes options to sort comments by "Top Comment" and "Terbaru" (Latest). There are also user comments visible, along with profile pictures and timestamps. One of the comments mentions "7 Hari Premium" (7 Days Premium) and a "Diktalm" (Claim) button. Another user comment says "rewatch lagi ah" (rewatch again). Overall, the content is typical of a media streaming or reading application and does not contain any explicit or suggestive material.
